title: SuperTnT
description: Now with this mod you can make explosives that are significantly better than regular TnT that you can make with the new Sulfur Dust!
body:
**NOTICE: I have stopped working on this project go to my other project called "ChemiCraft" if you like this mod you should try it, (Update) its out so if you liked this or you want to check it out feel free to do so..**

This is the SuperTnT Mod! This Mod adds the SuperTnT which is significantly better than
regular TnT.
As an example you can use this to troll you friends by trying to blow up their house or make a cool trap with it!
Getting SuperTnT is very easy! All you need to do is find a desert and look underground for some yellow stone, Thats Sulfur and when you mine it you will get Sulfur Dust. The reason i said  to go to a desert instead of an ocean or taiga (Which are the only other places sulfur is located) is because you can find it easlily because there is sand right there and Sulfur too. Then with 4 sand and 4 Sulfur Dust you cant craft it yet you need regular TnT first. And now you have it SuperTnT!

Planned Features:                                                                                
Sulfur Springs: A Biome Full of Sulfur and liquid Sulfur that is extremely Dangerous!          
Sulfur Decoration Blocks: Adds slabs, stairs And walls as well as their polished and chiseled varients.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
You can have this in your modpack if you would like and please let me know some feedback!
